message:
style: import reordering, formatting fixes, and test correction

- distributed/recovery.rs, lab/snapshot_restore.rs: alphabetize
  imports (rustfmt canonical ordering)
- http/h2/stream.rs: reformat assert! macro for readability
- http/h3_native.rs: reformat chained map_err closure
- messaging/jetstream.rs: use r"..." raw string instead of r#"..."#
  where no inner quotes exist
- obligation/choreography/mod.rs: fix test continuation name from
  "x" to "main" to match the protocol's actual loop label

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3335,7 +3335,7 @@ mod tests {
                     "a",
                     "go",
                     Interaction::comm("a", "data", "Data", "b")
-                        .then(Interaction::continue_("x"))
+                        .then(Interaction::continue_("main"))
                         .expect("comm interactions accept continuations"),
                     Interaction::comm("a", "done", "Done", "b"),
                 ),
